# Profiler transcript fixtures (PR-02)

Fictional multi-turn Explore/Launch conversations for offline validation of
structured profiler turns. Not real student data.

Metadata: `contract_version`, `prompt_version`, `fictional: true`.

Do not add live LLM outputs with real PII. PR-03 wires these patterns into the
session engine; PR-02 only freezes prompt + delta + static checks.
